# TokenFlow Promo Video Voiceover Script

## Auto-generated campaign line
"One API. Every model. Total control."

## Scene 1: Intro
"Meet TokenFlow. One API for every AI model."

## Scene 2: Problem
"No more vendor sprawl, key chaos, or hidden token costs."

## Scene 3: Solution
"Route GPT-4, Claude, Gemini, Llama, and more through one endpoint."

## Scene 4: Features
"Real-time analytics, enterprise security, and sub-fifty millisecond global routing."

## Scene 5: Pricing
"Start at twenty-nine dollars, scale to Professional, or go Enterprise."

## Scene 6: Proof
"Built for serious traffic: ten million daily requests, 500 clients, and 99.99 percent uptime."

## Scene 7: CTA
"Claim 10,000 free tokens. TokenFlow: build faster, scale better."
